title: zeylanidium subulatum
intro: Zeylanidium subulatum, also known as the lesser cardamom, is a type of plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zeylanidium subulatum are said to include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Zeylanidium subulatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and oils, to be used for medicinal purposes.
